title: alchemilla glaberrima proles flexicaulis
intro: Alchemilla glaberrima proles flexicaulis, also known as lady's mantle, is a perennial plant species in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the body, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Alchemilla glaberrima proles flexicaulis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and it is often used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health issues.
